backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a POS inventory backend with products map and sales list, exposing functions to add stock, record sales, query stock levels, sales history, and generate a daily Z-report with per-product revenue and profit aggregation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering DailySalesReport enrichment, product management hooks, ProductManagement page, and Dashboard updates.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure and each file's purpose.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based light and dark theme CSS custom properties for colors, borders, and sidebar tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with Azerbaijani language attribute, mobile-friendly viewport meta tag, and a root div that mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining all 8 application routes (Dashboard, AddStock, RecordSale, ViewInventory, DailySalesReport, SalesHistory, ResetInventory, ProductManagement) wrapped in a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header displaying the shop logo and title in Azerbaijani, with a back-arrow button shown on all non-home pages.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Full-page layout wrapper composing the Header, a centered main content area, and a footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/PasswordGate.tsx: Reusable password prompt component with show/hide toggle, client-side validation against the hardcoded password 'gulserxan', and Azerbaijani error messaging.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for backend interactions including adding stock, recording sales, fetching stock levels, sales history, Z report, and adding products.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens along with utility classes for buttons and layout.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddStock.tsx: Multi-step form page for adding stock to a product, allowing selection of product, quantity, and purchase price with a success confirmation screen.
frontend/src/pages/DailySalesReport.tsx: Page that displays a daily Z-report with revenue, profit, and per-product sales data, and supports sharing the report via WhatsApp.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Renders the main dashboard page with a list of navigation action buttons (add stock, record sale, view inventory, etc.) that route to their respective pages using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/pages/ProductManagement.tsx: Password-gated page for managing products, allowing admins to add new products or delete existing ones with confirmation, using mutation hooks and displaying success/error feedback.
frontend/src/pages/RecordSale.tsx: Multi-step form page for recording a sale, guiding the user through selecting a product, quantity, and price, then submitting via a mutation hook and showing a success summary.
frontend/src/pages/ResetInventory.tsx: Password-gated admin page for resetting inventory that currently displays a notice that the reset feature is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/pages/SalesHistory.tsx: Password-gated page displaying a filterable (by date and product) list of all sales records with aggregated revenue and unit totals, loading data via query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/ViewInventory.tsx: Password-gated page that displays current stock levels for all products in a sorted list, highlighting low or empty stock with color indicators and showing a total count.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, custom color tokens using oklch CSS variables, typography, container queries, animation plugins, and custom font families.
project_state.json: Project state document describing a mobile-first Azerbaijani-language POS inventory app with known bugs (stock add/sale errors, zero quantities, incomplete sales report) and existing features including dashboard, add stock, record sale, inventory view, and product management flows.
